productDisplayName: Fila Men's Hurricane Black Silver Shoe
description: Stylish and replete with comfort, the Hurricane cross trainers from fila are perfect for those who love those healthy runs. With a stylish trusstic shank, these shoes make for a fabulous lifestyle wear too.Upper Heavily meshed upper with smaller meshes along the medial side for maximum ventilation Synthetic overlays for added shoe structure and durability Reinforced synthetic overlays on heel for enhanced shoe life Reinforced toe box lining for durability and protection to the forefoot Symmetrical lace-up system for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Padded meshed tongue for breathing comfort and snug fit Synthetic overlay on tongue upper for durability and wearing comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Brand badge on lateral side for style Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned footbed for comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with dotted lugs and leaf lugs for durability and extra traction Flex grooves in the forefoot for flexibility Decoupled heel with multi-directional grooves and horizontal flex groove for maximum cushioning and protection of the heel Plastic trusstic shank for ergonomic comfort to the inner arch Scooped heel for cushioning Shoe careRub surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlightDo not machine wash
